name: Hot Pixel Removal and Sensor Cleaning
description: An astronomical image of a galaxy (~/ImageJ_Data/raw/noisy_galaxy.tif) has been corrupted by 'hot pixels' (single pixels with value 65535). Clean this image while preserving the scientific data (stars and galaxy structure). Remove the single-pixel noise without blurring the stars or the galaxy details; note that a simple Gaussian Blur is not acceptable as it destroys data resolution. Save the cleaned 16-bit image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/clean_galaxy.tif.
